rules.finding_pattern: Chronic left bundle branch block on baseline ECG
rules.why_it_matters: LBBB obscures standard STEMI ST-elevation criteria; ischemia must be assessed with Sgarbossa/modified Sgarbossa criteria against a known baseline tracing, not against generic STEMI criteria.

rules.finding_pattern: Active therapeutic anticoagulation (DOAC) for atrial fibrillation
rules.why_it_matters: Anticoagulation changes the bleeding-risk calculus for cath, thrombolysis, and any invasive procedure; last-dose timing determines reversal strategy if bleeding or urgent surgery arises.

rules.finding_pattern: Prior negative cardiac workup for a different symptom pattern (at-rest vs. exertional)
rules.why_it_matters: A negative workup for one symptom pattern does not clear a different, higher-risk presentation. Anchoring on the prior negative result risks premature closure of the differential.

rules.finding_pattern: PDE5 inhibitor (sildenafil/tadalafil) use within the nitrate contraindication window
rules.why_it_matters: Concurrent nitrates with a PDE5 inhibitor can cause profound, refractory hypotension. This is an absolute contraindication for at least 24 hours after sildenafil (48h after tadalafil).

rules.finding_pattern: Documented incomplete ischemic workup with an explicit low-threshold recommendation for re-evaluation
rules.why_it_matters: Cardiology has already flagged this gap in writing and specified the trigger for re-workup. Today's presentation is the scenario that note anticipated.

rules.finding_pattern: Elevated high-sensitivity troponin above the 99th percentile URL, with or without STEMI-equivalent ECG
rules.why_it_matters: Confirms myocardial injury; shifts disposition toward the ACS pathway even when the ECG is non-diagnostic due to baseline conduction delay.

recommendations.text: Chronic LBBB precludes standard STEMI ECG criteria — apply Sgarbossa/modified Sgarbossa criteria and compare today's tracing directly to the 11/2024 baseline before ruling ischemia in or out.
recommendations.rationale: Generic ST-elevation thresholds are unreliable in the presence of LBBB and can produce false-negative or false-positive STEMI calls.
recommendations.evidence_line: ACC/AHA STEMI Guideline — Sgarbossa/modified Sgarbossa criteria in the presence of LBBB

recommendations.text: Confirm apixaban last-dose timing before any invasive workup, thrombolysis, or line placement. Have reversal (andexanet alfa) protocol identified in case of bleeding or emergent surgery.
recommendations.rationale: CHA2DS2-VASc 4 on a DOAC — timing is currently undocumented in the ED note and materially changes cath/surgical risk.
recommendations.evidence_line: ACC 2020 Expert Consensus — periprocedural management of DOAC therapy

recommendations.text: The 6/28/2026 negative workup evaluated pain that was at rest. Today's presentation is exertional — that pattern was never cleared. Do not treat the prior negative result as reassurance for this visit.
recommendations.rationale: Different symptom triggers carry different pretest probabilities; the prior encounter explicitly did not address exertional symptoms.
recommendations.evidence_line: Cardiology 6/28/2026 note — workup scoped to at-rest pain only

recommendations.text: Patient took sildenafil ~11 hours ago. Nitrates — including sublingual and IV nitroglycerin — are contraindicated for at least 24 hours. Alert pharmacy and strip nitrate orders from any ACS order set before they're placed.
recommendations.rationale: Sildenafil + nitrates can cause severe, refractory hypotension; this needs to be visible before anyone reaches for nitro.
recommendations.evidence_line: FDA labeling — PDE5 inhibitor / organic nitrate contraindication

actions.label: Alert Pharmacy — nitrate hold

recommendations.text: Cardiology's outpatient workup for this patient's LBBB / reduced-EF picture remains incomplete despite an explicit low-threshold recommendation for re-evaluation with exertional symptoms. Today's presentation meets that threshold — and the outside stress echo faxed in today (equivocal, never followed up) reinforces the gap.
recommendations.rationale: The prior physician already documented the exact trigger for re-workup; that trigger has now occurred.
recommendations.evidence_line: Cardiology 1/2026 outpatient note — explicit low-threshold recommendation for exertional symptoms

recommendations.text: Update Cardiology on-call with NSTEMI-pattern presentation. Troponin-positive with LBBB precluding Sgarbossa STEMI-equivalent — combined picture is high-risk. Include anticoagulation status and reversal considerations in the update.
recommendations.rationale: Troponin elevation with a non-diagnostic ECG establishes NSTEMI/UA; cardiology involvement determines cath timing and coordinates anticoagulation management.
recommendations.evidence_line: ACC/AHA/HFSA 2020 NSTEMI Guideline — early invasive vs. conservative strategy in high-risk patients

actions.label: Update Cardiology on-call
actions.template:
UPDATE — NSTEMI-pattern presentation.

Patient: {name}, {age}{sex}, MRN {mrn}
Location: ED bed {bed}
CC: {chief_complaint}
Vitals: HR {hr}, BP {bp}

Key findings:
  - hs-Troponin T at 10:57: 62 ng/L (ref <14) — critical high
  - Today's ECG: sinus tach 102, LBBB unchanged from 11/2024 baseline, no Sgarbossa criteria
  - Chronic LBBB precludes STEMI-equivalent interpretation; combined with trop+ = NSTEMI-pattern
  - Outside 2024 stress echo (faxed today): peak-stress inferolateral hypokinesis, equivocal, never followed up
  - Cardiology 1/2026 explicitly flagged incomplete ischemic workup with exertional-symptom follow-up recommendation

Medications relevant:
  - Apixaban 5 mg BID (CHA2DS2-VASc 4) — LAST DOSE TIMING NOT DOCUMENTED
  - ASA 324 mg given at triage 09:20
  - Sildenafil ~11h prior — nitrates contraindicated

Requesting guidance on cath timing, anticoagulation reversal planning, and whether to pursue further imaging before invasive strategy.
